operation.name: write_at_vgem_postproc_ctx_alloc
preconditions:
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun completions_cap () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (=  false (bvule  (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  completions_cap (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  completions_cap (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  completions_cap (_ bv1 32) ) (select  completions_cap (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)
(set-logic QF_AUFBV )
(declare-fun completions_cap () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(declare-fun desc_count () (Array (_ BitVec 32) (_ BitVec 8) ) )
(assert (bvule  (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  desc_count (_ bv1 32) ) (select  desc_count (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) (concat  (select  completions_cap (_ bv3 32) ) (concat  (select  completions_cap (_ bv2 32) ) (concat  (select  completions_cap (_ bv1 32) ) (select  completions_cap (_ bv0 32) ) ) ) ) ) )
(check-sat)
(exit)

oracle_spec.assertion: postproc_ctx.job_count stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs
assumptions: producer sets job_count without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant

metadata.wma: Logic-Induced Signal Divergence to Adversary-Controlled Memory Access
